sp_widget.description: Post-lesson feedback form: students rate and comment on completed lessons
sp_widget.name: German Lesson Feedback
sp_widget.template:
Rate Your Lessons

{{c.message}}
No completed lessons pending feedback.
Teacher: {{lesson.teacher}}
Date: {{lesson.start_time}} – {{lesson.end_time}}
Lesson Summary:

Feedback submitted for {{lesson.start_time}}
